title: Basic Goroutine
description: Launch a function in the background using the go keyword.
problemStatement:
Goroutines are lightweight threads. Create a function `say(s string)` that prints the string. Call it with `go say("Async")` and adding a small delay in `main` so the output is visible.

**Requirement:** Use `time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)` to allow the goroutine to finish.
hints: If `main` exits, all other goroutines are killed instantly.
